title: Pride: Confessions of a Straight Filmmaker
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: Confessions of a Straight Filmmaker On the 10th anniversary of the release of “Julio of Jackson Heights,” a documentary film that tells the story of the 1990 gay bashing murder of Julio Rivera and the founding of the Queens Pride Parade, filmmaker Richard Shpuntoff revisits the making this film with a critical eye on his […]

title: NYC Mayor’s Public Engagement Unit at QPL
venue: Queens Public Library at Jackson Heights
description: The Mayor’s Public Engagement Unit (PEU) is holding tabling hours at branches across Queens to provide direct, in-person assistance with essential city services. These sessions are designed for anyone who needs face-to-face help with city systems. No appointment required. PEU staff can help residents navigate HRA benefits, understand eligibility, and complete applications on the spot. […]

title: Clases de tejido / Crochet Classes
description: Ven a relajarte con nosotros mientras aprendes a tejer. Esta clase es para todos los niveles, materiales incluidos. Actividad 100% familiar. Todos son bienvenidos!! Come relax with us while you learn to knit. This class is for all levels, materials included. 100% family activity. Everyone is welcome!! Run by 34th Avenue Open Streets Coalition

title: Mutual Aid Folk Show with Melanie Beth Curran, Racoon Tyrant, Frank Burzinski, K. Porcelain, Pheobe Weyland
description: Mutual Aid folk music show with Melanie Beth Curran, Racoon Tyrant (touring from Philly), Frank Burzinski, K. Porcelain, Pheobe Weyland. All proceeds go to victims of ICE. Suggested donation $10-$15

title: Friday Wine Tasting
description: Stop by between 5pm and 8pm. Let us introduce you to wines worth talking about.

title: SunnyPride 2026
description: Celebrate Pride with us! SunnyPride is more than just a celebration; it’s a community-powered show of love, visibility, and joy right here in Sunnyside, Queens. In a time when LGBTQ+ rights and lives continue to be challenged, showing up matters more than ever. This is our chance to come together, loudly, proudly, and unapologetically, to […]
